hero.title: Healthcare That Understands You
hero.description: AI-powered symptom triage, verified hospitals, and seamless appointments. Get the right care at the right time with NeronaHealth.

features.title: Everything You Need for Better Health
features.description: From AI symptom analysis to emergency dispatch, we connect you with the right care instantly

features.title: AI Symptom Analysis
features.description: Describe your symptoms naturally. Our AI analyzes urgency and recommends the right care pathway in seconds.

features.title: Verified Hospitals
features.description: Browse vetted healthcare facilities with real-time capacity updates, pricing transparency, and patient reviews.

features.title: Smart Appointments
features.description: Book appointments with available doctors instantly. No phone calls, no waiting, just seamless scheduling.

features.title: Emergency Dispatch
features.description: One-tap emergency request with GPS tracking. Ambulance dispatched to your location within minutes.

features.title: Digital Records
features.description: Secure cloud storage for your medical history. Access prescriptions, lab results, and visit notes anywhere.

features.title: Privacy First
features.description: Your health data is encrypted and protected. HIPAA-compliant security with complete transparency.

testimonials.quote: I described my chest pain to the AI and it immediately recommended I see a doctor. Turns out it was early signs of something serious. NeronaHealth may have saved my life.
testimonials.author: Adaora Okafor

testimonials.quote: As a doctor, I was skeptical at first. But NeronaHealth has reduced my no-shows by 40% and I can see patient histories before they walk in. Game changer for my practice.
testimonials.author: Dr. Emeka Nwosu

testimonials.quote: Our hospital has seen a 60% increase in appointment bookings since joining. Patients love being able to see real-time availability.
testimonials.author: Dr. Funke Adeyemi

cta.title: Ready to Experience Better Healthcare?
cta.description: Join thousands of patients and healthcare providers across Nigeria who trust NeronaHealth.
